inputs.label: Gross Score
inputs.businessContext: Your actual strokes for the round, before any adjustments.

businessContext_i18n.en: Your actual strokes for the round, before any adjustments.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tur için gerçek vuruşlarınız, herhangi bir düzeltmeden önce.

inputs.label: Course Rating
inputs.businessContext: The USGA Course Rating from the tee you played, typically between 67 and 77.

businessContext_i18n.en: The USGA Course Rating from the tee you played, typically between 67 and 77.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Oynadığınız tee'den USGA Saha Derecesi, tipik olarak 67 ile 77 arasında.

inputs.label: Slope Rating
inputs.businessContext: The USGA Slope Rating, indicates relative difficulty for bogey golfers compared to scratch golfers, range 55-155.

businessContext_i18n.en: The USGA Slope Rating, indicates relative difficulty for bogey golfers compared to scratch golfers, range 55-155.
businessContext_i18n.tr: USGA Eğim Derecesi, boği golfçüler için sıfır handikaplı golfçülere göre göreceli zorluğu gösterir, aralık 55-155.

inputs.label: Par
inputs.businessContext: The total par for the course, needed for Course Handicap calculation.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total par for the course, needed for Course Handicap calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sahanın toplam parı, Saha Handikap hesaplaması için gereklidir.

inputs.label: Handicap Index
inputs.businessContext: Your current Handicap Index, if known, to calculate Course Handicap.

businessContext_i18n.en: Your current Handicap Index, if known, to calculate Course Handicap.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Biliniyorsa mevcut Handikap İndeksiniz, Saha Handikap'ı hesaplamak için.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
